titleStmt.title: SII 28.300: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 300. (A.R. No. 454 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, Kamalamaṅgai shrine, north wall.

It records a royal order addressed for execution to Vilāḍarāyar and puravariyār (officials in charge of taxes) intimating that the village Kuṟukkaipāḍi viz, levies, poṉvari, kāśyam, kāttikai-ppachchai nall-erudu, naṟ-paśu, ūśivāśi, mātruśānti and other kinds of levies, taṟiy-iṟai, maniy-iṟai,chekk-iṟai, āṭṭ-iṟai-ppāṭṭam and magamai had been assigned as dēvadāṉa-iṟaili, for the worship and maintenance of the premises of God Tāyilum-nalla-chōḷīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyanār. The record was attested by Vāṇakōvaraiyaṉ and Viḻuppādarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vilāṭarāyarum puravariyārum ceyakkaṭavapaṭi kuṟukkaipāṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭ ṉcey puṉcey karaip puṉcey nattap puṉcey Ental paṟṟu
poṉvari kācāyam kāttikaippaccai nallerutu naṟpacu Ūcivāci mātirucānti Uḷḷiṭṭa tāyaṅkaḷum taṟiyiṟai maṉaiyiṟai cekkiṟai Āṭṭiṟaippāṭṭam
makaṇmaiyum Uṭpaṭa Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār tāyulumnallacoḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku O vatu paṅkūṉi mātattu Eṭṭān tiyati mutal pūcaikkum tiruppaṇi
kkum Uṭalāka tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭom Ippaṭi cantirātittavaraiyum celvatāka kaṟṟaḷiyile kallum veṭṭi Ūr nāṉkellaiyilum tiru
ccūlasdhāpaṉamum paṇṇik koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum coṉṉom Ippaṭi kaṇakkilum niṟuta ppate Ivai vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarā
yaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
